title: cerastium alpinum var. villosum
intro: Cerastium alpinum var. villosum, also known as woolly mouse-ear, is a perennial flowering plant in the carnation family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum var. villosum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
